products.name: xMOR Product Family
products.descriptor: Interpoint® 120-watt DC-DC power converter family for space, defense, and commercial applications

evidence.snippet: Introducing Crane A&E's Interpoint® 120-Watt DC-DC Converter Product Family

The ‘x’ in our new Interpoint® brand xMOR product family represents a customers’ variable - the power conversion solution needed to enable innovation. With our new 120-watt product family of cMOR, hMOR, rMOR and sMOR converters, we look forward to Powering Your Mission!

products.name: cMOR Power Converter
products.descriptor: COTS 120 W DC-DC converter tested to MIL-STD-883 for commercial aerospace and defense

evidence.snippet:
cMOR Power Converter
--------------------
Crane A&E’s new Interpoint® cMOR power converter combines Interpoint’s proven quality and excellence into a high-reliability, cost-effective, off-the-shelf solution for commercial aerospace and defense applications. The cMOR features synchronization, soft start capability and serves as a versatile power conversion solution.

*   Cost effective solution
*   Synchronous rectification design
*   Forward clamp switching
*   Hi-Rel COTS tested to MIL-STD 883
[cMOR data sheet](/sites/default/files/resources/cMOR%20Rev.AB%2020250514%20Datasheet.pdf)

products.name: hMOR Power Converter
products.descriptor: Class H MIL-PRF-38534-compliant 120 W DC-DC converter for mission-critical defense applications

evidence.snippet:
hMOR Power Converter
--------------------
Crane A&E’s new Interpoint® hMOR power converter combines Interpoint’s proven quality and excellence with improved performance for mission-critical, defense applications. The hMOR is Class H compliant, light weight, highly efficient, features up to 120W of power and supports fast start-up for quick boot-up systems
*   Low ripple

*   High efficiency
*   Light weight
*   MIL-PRF 38534 Class H compliant
\*hMOR data sheet coming soon

products.name: rMOR Power Converter
products.descriptor: Radiation-tolerant 120 W DC-DC converter for new space / LEO satellite applications

evidence.snippet: rMOR Power Converter

*   Up to 92% efficiency
*   15V-50V input voltage
*   Tested to TID 30krads
*   Tested to SEE 43MeV

products.name: sMOR Power Converter
products.descriptor: Class K deep-space 120 W DC-DC converter with guaranteed radiation hardness for critical space missions

evidence.snippet: sMOR Power Converter

*   19V-50V input voltage
*   Guaranteed TID 100krads and 86 MeV
*   Up to 120W
*   Class K Compliant

products.name: Fuel Gauging Systems
products.descriptor: Aerospace fuel quantity measurement systems from active probes to complete gauging systems for commercial, helicopter, and UAV platforms

evidence.snippet:
Fuel Gauging Systems
------------------------

Crane provides proven fuel gauging solutions from standalone active fuel probes with integrated electronics to complete gauging systems which include cockpit displays, external refuel panels, and optional sensors (level, density & temperature). Crane fuel products ensure accurate and reliable, real-time fuel quantity measurement with a focus on the large commercial, business, regional, helicopter and UAV markets.

products.name: Integrated Microwave Assemblies (IMAs)
products.descriptor: Custom RF/microwave assemblies including beamformers, frequency converters, oscillators, and switch matrices for defense, satellite, and commercial applications

evidence.snippet:
Integrated Microwave Assemblies
-------------------------------
Industry-trusted IMAs include beamformers, complex oscillator assemblies, frequency converter assemblies and switch matrix systems for defense, satellite and commercial applications.

products.name: 2-18 GHz Down Converter
products.descriptor: Wideband 2–18 GHz RF down converter with built-in test functions and optional LNA, EAR99 classified

evidence.snippet:
### 2 - 18 GHz DOWN CONVERTER
*   Full 2 - 18 GHz RF Coverage
*   Low RMS Jitter
*   Superior Frequency Flatness and Intercept
    Performance
*   Internal Built-in Test Functions
*   Optional LNA can be placed at the front to improve
    NF at the expense of the intercept point
*   EAR99

products.name: 0.5-22 GHz Modular Synthesizer

evidence.snippet:
